violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open bag of thawed precooked sausage links were not date marked. -Batter in refrigerator was not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Raw wood used as supports/shelving at counter in kitchen prep area. -Lower shelves of refrigeration closet have minor peeling paint.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Residue/debris build up at sink edges.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Facility has Chlorine test strips but uses a Quat sanitizer. *Must have Quat test strips available for Quat sanitizer.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -2 cases of plates and 1 case of coffee cup lids stored on floor in kitchen prep area.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Plastic silverware is not inverted to protect food contact surfaces (at counter in breakfast room).

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/limescale/debris at plumbing lines, floors and walls of dish pit area.
